task.title: Align CodeWiki skill package with compiler and API contracts
task.summary: Update packaged CodeWiki skills and workflow assets so they route work through feedback, documentation, implementation, validation, graph, roadmap, build, and agency contracts without stale roadmap-work-item or nested-KB assumptions.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki packaged skills reflect the flat KB, builds-as-briefs model, gated agency, validation gateway, and active-roadmap truth boundaries.
acceptance: Skills route ambiguous intent to feedback and accepted changes to documentation builds before implementation work.
Planning/task skills use documentation_build plus roadmap work item language instead of legacy requirements-packet briefs.
Verify/view-audit skills align with validation gateway and graph state-machine contracts.
Skills avoid stale references to deleted nested system docs and legacy operating-model paths.
Workflow guidance stays progressive-disclosure and does not bypass API/roadmap/build/validation semantics.
non_goals: Do not copy external skill conventions that duplicate CodeWiki knowledge, roadmap, build, validation, or graph truth.
Do not make skills hand-edit generated graph or roadmap shards.
Do not implement runtime code refactors beyond skill/docs alignment.
verification: grep skills for stale nested KB paths and roadmap-work-item terminology
Review skill router against system/api.md, compilers.md, validation-gateway.md, agency.md
Run existing smoke/tests if skill package loading is affected.

delta.desired: Skills are aligned with the new CodeWiki compiler/API/graph/agency model.
delta.current: Skills still contain some old requirements-packet and legacy operating-model language.
delta.closure: Skill docs aligned with current KB contracts; implementation build 2026-05-10-task-034-skill-alignment.json validates closure.
